_provenance.writtenBy: stardust:direct (updated; initial bootstrap by stardust:seed + stardust:brief hand-authored)
_provenance.scope: pipeline state — initial bootstrap was hand-authored as proof-of-concept for /stardust:seed + /stardust:brief; this update written by /stardust:direct

direction.phrase: rooted, irreverent, hand-made. Saturday night and Sunday morning at the same time.
direction.variantMode: multi-variant fork (retroactive — variants B and C generated after v2-A re-shape per context/stardust-prototype-skill.md § Failure mode #4 corrective)

variants.name: Revival-Tent Collage
variants.role: faithful + improvements (the v2 re-shape; ampersand-as-design centerline)
variants.tagline: Saturday night sin. Sunday morning hymn. Both in one bottle.
variants.groundFamily: two-register alternation (bulletin-cream + hymnal-black) with hand-painted plywood textures
variants.fontDeck: Smokum (display, revival-tent poster) + Lora (body, hymnbook) + Caveat (script, handwritten) + IBM Plex Mono (numerals)
variants.amplifies: hand-painted plywood signage motif + revival-tent poster character + the AMPERSAND as the design
variants.composition: asymmetric collage: left-anchored hero, full-bleed letter-on-table, plywood-collage 'Back Room', 180° bottle fan, folk-art map pew list

variants.name: Almanac Page
variants.role: HYMN half amplified — typographic-led restraint within the brand
variants.tagline: An almanac of botanical spirits, from Wolfpen Holler.
variants.shapeBrief: stardust/prototypes/home-shape-variant-a.md (inline brief in <!-- stardust:provenance --> of the proposed HTML)
variants.groundFamily: single hymnbook-paper ground (bulletin-cream + hymnal-black for the almanac entries section)
variants.fontDeck: IM Fell DW Pica + Old Standard TT (display + body, hand-set transitional serif) + IBM Plex Mono (numerals); no script tier
variants.amplifies: the HYMN half + the Memoir-adjacent register + Foxfire-Book typographic lineage
variants.composition: almanac title-page hero (centered, decorative rules), typeset multi-column 'Place & Still' entry, 6-bottle typeset catalog with double-rules and prices, leader-dot pew list, colophon footer

variants.name: Outlaw Album Sleeve
variants.role: HOLLER half amplified — atmospheric/photographic-led within the brand
variants.shapeBrief: inline brief in <!-- stardust:provenance --> of the proposed HTML
variants.groundFamily: single deep-black ground throughout (hymnal-black with radial-gradient atmospheric overlays per section)
variants.fontDeck: Anton (display, heavy condensed sans, album-credits character) + Spectral (body, cinematic serif) + Caveat (script, signature) + IBM Plex Mono (numerals/track-markers)
variants.amplifies: the HOLLER half + the 1970s outlaw-country album-sleeve register + cinematic restraint
variants.composition: atmospheric dark hero (single big wordmark + song-title-style tagline + one CTA), spare centered Wendell quote, side-B 'Place & Still' combined panel, three vertical poster-sections for featured bottles, liner-notes pew list, album-credits footer

direction.pickReasoning: Brand pivot REJECTED 2026-05-11. The user explored the Mediterranean-pop palette through 7 swaps on the variant-c composition and converged on teal-saturated as the palette-deployment preference, but declined to amend Holler & Hymn's documented Appalachian outlaw-country brand register to match. teal-saturated stays on disk as a parallel exploration artifact (relevant for the demo's seam-beat narration as 'what user-driven palette exploration looks like'); it is NOT the canonical Holler & Hymn home prototype. The cross-session palette preference (diverse, saturated, broad-set, asymmetric-cycling) was captured in feedback_palette_saturation_preference.md and applies to future design work; the Holler & Hymn brand specifically stays Appalachian per the current BRAND.md / DESIGN.md.

explorationOutcome.explorationWinnerStatus: preserved as a parallel artifact; NOT the canonical Holler & Hymn brand; surfaced in context/stardust-prototype-skill.md § Failure mode #5 as the corrective output for the palette-deployment skill miss

canonicalDirectionPending.saturationReviewNote: Whichever variant advances, consider re-evaluating its palette deployment per the saturation preference captured in feedback_palette_saturation_preference.md — variant-a currently uses only 2 ground colors (cream + hymnal-black). Could be upgraded to deploy more brand tokens (rhody-green, gilt-gold) as additional section grounds while staying in the Appalachian palette.

direction.mode: Mode A (brand-faithful) — palette + 3-tier type pinned; decade/craft/register-flavor rolled (anchored by BRAND.md cultural references); Mode C ground-family override (two-register pattern brand-native). Multi-variant fork now active: each variant differs by ≥2 substantive changes (composition strategy, type deck, ground-family treatment, register-flavor balance) per the variant differentiation contract.
direction.improvementsListSkippedReason: greenfield — current/ is hand-authored as the brand's desired target, not a captured deployment to fix. There is no execution gap to close.

pages.title: Holler & Hymn — botanical liqueurs from Wolfpen Holler, NC

shapeBriefHistory.result: slop — encoded the AI-craft-default silhouette; produced render that hit 5 of 9 brand anti-references plus 3 impeccable absolute bans

anti-default — encodes asymmetric / collage / hand-imperfect / full-bleed composition per section; refuses centered-hero, dual-CTA-pair, 3-col card grid, parallel splits, 1200px uniform container. Now slotted as variant A in the multi-variant fork.

prototypeHistory.result: slop — analysis in context/stardust-prototype-skill.md § Failure mode #1
anti-default re-shape; manual audit clean against the 3 silhouette markers from context/stardust-prototype-skill.md § proposal C; Smokum + Lora + Caveat + IBM Plex Mono loaded via Google Fonts <link>
HYMN-half amplified — almanac page composition with hand-set transitional-serif typography; IM Fell DW Pica + Old Standard TT + IBM Plex Mono
HOLLER-half amplified — outlaw-country album-sleeve composition with heavy condensed sans display; Anton + Spectral + Caveat + IBM Plex Mono

v1.verdict: rejected — re-shape required; analysis recorded in context/stardust-prototype-skill.md

v2.method: manual against context/stardust-prototype-skill.md § proposal C silhouette markers + § F.1 font-availability audit

identical-card-grid.result: clean (below the 4-of-4 threshold; catalog entries have distinct compositions)

Kinfolk-luxe-minimal.result: clean — full-bleed grounds, varied padding, varied gutters, rotations on ~20 elements

font-availability.method: Google Fonts CDN <link>; deviation from impeccable's self-contained rule documented in prototype provenance comment; migrate path: self-host WOFF2

color-palette-discipline.note: tape-mustard #d8a740 elevated from undocumented derived var to documented 7th brand token; usage rule (tape/sticker/ribbon-only) added to DESIGN.md § Named Rules + DESIGN.json extensions.colorMeta.quarantined[]

p2Advisory: Bottle fan SVG silhouettes use mono labels with letter-spacing; could be more hand-painted character if inline-SVG curved text were added per bottle. Acceptable as first pass since Gemini Lane 3 hand-painted labels will replace the fan rendering downstream

appliedFixes.issue: Display fallback to Impact erases revival-tent character (Failure mode #3 per context/stardust-prototype-skill.md)
appliedFixes.fix: added <link> to Google Fonts (Smokum/Lora/Caveat/IBM Plex Mono); display now renders Smokum (decorative slab, bracketed serifs, fairground-poster character) instead of Impact (generic bold news headline)

appliedFixes.issue: tape-mustard #d8a740 was an undocumented derived CSS variable outside the locked 6-token palette
appliedFixes.fix: elevated to documented 7th brand token in DESIGN.md (colors + Named Rule: Tape-Mustard Restriction Rule) and DESIGN.json (extensions.colorMeta.quarantined[] + brandTokens)

appliedFixes.issue: Failure mode #3 framed as 'P2 advisory, defer to Phase 4 polish' was wrong — display type is the brand's loudest surface, equal in severity to silhouette miss
appliedFixes.fix: sharpened context/stardust-prototype-skill.md Failure mode #3 with severity recharacterization + proposals F.1 (mandatory font-availability audit in Phase 2.5) + F.2 (expectedCharacter assertions in DESIGN.json) + F.3 ('render-character violations equal render-composition violations') + F.4 (web-font CDN exception to self-contained rule for brand Mode A)

v2.verdict: approved as the v2 anti-default re-shape with typography character + tape-mustard token applied — pending user sign-off
